gate.claim_scope: remote eight-key screen and deterministic at-most-eight-candidate 64-key confirmation over 30 adjacent fixed-bit positions, each using exact 2^30 plaintext assignments and verified paired Phase C keys; not neural training, paper-scale, an all-key proof, or a new integral-property claim

next_action.action: hold neural training and evaluate preregistered non-adjacent or rotation-equivalent families
